message:
refactor(core): add process/io/net modules to runtime_compat and migrate consumers

Adds three new runtime_compat modules centralizing tokio primitives:
- process: wraps tokio::process::Command
- io: re-exports AsyncReadExt/AsyncWriteExt for TCP I/O
- net: re-exports TcpListener/TcpStream

Migrates 7 consumer files from direct tokio imports:
- caut.rs, cass.rs, wezterm.rs: tokio::process::Command → runtime_compat
- metrics.rs: tokio::io/net → runtime_compat::io/net
- workflows.rs: tokio::runtime::Runtime → RuntimeBuilder (12 test sites)
- storage.rs: tokio::runtime::Runtime → RuntimeBuilder (3 test sites)

Includes 12 new tests covering process/io/net modules (151 total).
All 12,946 lib tests pass, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
